status_reason: Blocked engineering evidence: public Web PWA, analysis endpoints, signed peer config, and fallback WSS peer health endpoints are reachable through Cloudflare, and public WSS peer-config proof completed with no failures but status review_required. StoryCluster correctness and source health pass, and singleton persistence/later bundling is covered by tests, but public headline-soak evidence still fails because browser semantic readback hangs or times out after live publication. Deployed public feed browser smoke failed with public-feed-headlines-timeout and terminal evidence showed system-writer signature validation failures on public news index rows. Mesh release_ready and production app canary pass are not claimed.

news_daemon_stack_startup.summary: Build @vh/luma-sdk before @vh/gun-client for news daemon runtime imports.

analysis_relay_gpt5_empty_content_compat.summary: Expand completion-token budget across missing-content retries, preserve finish-reason diagnostics, and read text-array choice content.

upstream_auth_error_redaction.summary: Redact API-key-shaped upstream error text and expose machine-readable auth failure classification on the analysis health path.

env_profile_diagnosis.secret_printing: not printed; OPENAI_API_KEY and ANALYSIS_RELAY_API_KEY presence verified only

deployed_public_smoke.terminal_observation: system-writer-validation-failed / signature-invalid for public news index rows before timeout

storycluster_production_readiness.singleton_policy: singleton stories remain valid feed items and are covered by tests for later upgrade into bundles when matching articles arrive

current_clean_mesh_observations: LUMA-gated write coverage passed on the clean PR branch.

The Mesh aggregate ran from a clean tree and passed topology, signed peer config, state resolution, disconnect, partition, read repair, canonical 30-minute soak, clock skew, and conflict source gates.
The canonical soak source report passed full duration with zero terminal failures, zero duplicate canonical writes, cleanup pass, and all required write/resource sample floors satisfied.
Public WSS deployment proof failed closed because the required public DNS/TLS/WSS infrastructure is unavailable.
Mesh release_ready is not claimed; aggregate blockers are public-wss-deployment-proof and evidence-scrub-promotion.
mesh_and_app_canary.production_app_canary_downstream_observa: Mesh status is blocked; public deployment and Mesh release_ready prerequisites are unavailable

approvals.external_legal_rationale: public beta copy makes no regulated/commercial/legal claims
approvals.rollback_rationale: fresh launch, no release version, no userbase, no migration

allowed_launch_copy: Web PWA MVP public beta candidate for the implemented scope.
Source health passed the complete release evidence window.
LUMA public-beta is MVP-production-ready as a fail-closed beta-local identity and signed-write layer.
Release-shaped public/remote analysis health passed using the Mac-mini-local release env path recorded in this packet.
StoryCluster production readiness is currently blocked by headline soak release evidence; do not claim production-grade live headline freshness.

Local public/remote Web PWA feed smoke passed with current headlines, source labels, timestamps, detail, accepted synthesis, identity, stance, comments, reload persistence, and second-browser visibility.

Public ingress is configured through Cloudflare Tunnel, but public self-hosted WSS Mesh, production app canary, and public https://venn.carboncaste.io app service remain blocked until origin services are deployed, nested peer TLS is fixed or fallback peer names are used, and public WSS proof passes.

native App Store or TestFlight readiness

blockers.observed: Cloudflare routes exist, but the app and peer origins on A6 localhost:8080, A6 localhost:8765, A6 localhost:8766, and Mac mini 192.168.1.56:8767 are not serving yet; Cloudflare returns HTTP/2 502 for TLS-valid routes.
blockers.required_action: Deploy persistent Web PWA and Gun peer services with health checks and restart persistence behind the configured origins.

blockers.observed: gun-a/b/c.venn.carboncaste.io resolve through Cloudflare but fail TLS handshake because Cloudflare Free Universal SSL does not cover nested *.venn.carboncaste.io hostnames.
blockers.required_action: Enable Cloudflare Advanced Certificate Manager or a custom certificate for *.venn.carboncaste.io, or use the TLS-valid fallback peer hostnames gun-a/b/c.carboncaste.io for the public Mesh proof.

blockers.observed: No public WSS proof has run against deployed app/peer services yet.
blockers.required_action: After origin deployment, publish signed peer config, set CSP connect-src, run public WSS proof with minimum peer count 3 and quorum 2, and do not lower thresholds.

explicit_non_claims: public WSS bootstrap mesh is deployed
LUMA Silver, verified-human identity, one-human-one-vote, Sybil resistance, production attestation, or native App Store/TestFlight readiness
